title: Etsan's Better Tools 26.2
description: My own re-imagining of the Minecraft tools in hopes to improve on their overall visual design and clarity.
body:
This pack updates all tools with a fresher look that improves on their original designs and focuses on clarity. Due to it only changing the tools it can be combined with almost any other pack.![preview of tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fdf9310c9056126f9bdb890189fbd8d0fad8431a_0.webp)

If you are looking for the gui textures you can find them by visiting my other resourcepack: [Etsan's Better Hotbar](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/etsans-better-hotbar/versions)
